nasb.text: The rest of the Jews joined him in hypocrisy, with the result that even Barnabas was carried away by their hypocrisy.

esv.text: And the rest of the Jews acted hypocritically along with him, so that even Barnabas was led astray by their hypocrisy.

cnv.text: 其餘的猶太人也和他一同裝假，甚至連巴拿巴也受了影響，跟著他們裝假。

ccb.text: 其他的犹太基督徒也跟着彼得装假，甚至连巴拿巴也随从了他们的虚伪。

csbs.text: 其余的犹太人也跟着他装假，以致连巴拿巴也被他们的伪善引入歧途。
